title: Cheesemania gibbsii
taxonomy: Cheesemania gibbsii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Gesneriaceae. The family Gesneriaceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the gesneriad family. They are primarily found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The Gesneriaceae family belongs to the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Members of the Gesneriaceae family are typically herbaceous or shrub-like plants that produce showy flowers.
